summary: INCOMPLETE DELIVERABLE. Task explicitly requires TDD with bats-core tests as primary output; NO test file exists. Missing: test/cleanup-artifacts.bats, fixtures/*.tsv, test harness infrastructure, act-result.txt generation, and workflow steps to run tests. Workflow only does one dry-run without verification. Actions unpinned to SHA (security violation). Script itself is well-written with good error handling and comments, but untestable without infrastructure. Lines 80-102 (keep-latest sorting) and 104-121 (max-total-size) have complex logic requiring test coverage. Workflow accepts fixture overrides via env vars (good design) but doesn't leverage them for multi-case testing.
